items.title: Is Visa Inc. (V) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
items.description: We came across a bullish thesis on Visa Inc. on Grillo Insights’s Substack by Eric García. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on V. Visa Inc.’s share was trading at $320.83 as of March 3rd. V’s trailing and forward P/E were 30.09 and 25.00 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. Visa Inc. (V) closed Q1 FY2026 on December 31, 2025, amid a cautiously optimistic economic backdrop, with moderated U.S. inflation, resilient consumer spending, and […]

items.description: IPAY's top holdings, including PayPal and Fiserv, suffered operational setbacks and earnings disappointments. Read why IPAY is downgraded to Hold.

items.title: Visa Expands Bridge Partnership to Boost Global Payment Reach
items.description: V expands Bridge partnership to roll out stablecoin-linked cards in 100+ countries and boost its global crypto payment push.

items.title: AmEx Turns on the Cash Tap: Dividends Boom Amid AI Concerns
items.description: AXP lifts dividend 16% to 95 cents as cash flow jumps, even as AI layoff fears rattle market sentiment.
